channel.title: Matt Parker — Releases
channel.description: Tagged releases across the public archive by Matt Parker.

item.title: ClearCut v3.74.110
item.description: Premium mobile creator workspace: a dominant preview, calmer timeline hierarchy, compact six-category editing tools, clearer primary actions, sharper shared chrome, and streamlined gallery, settings, recovery, and export

item.title: ImgConverter v3.5.0
item.description: - Reframed the desktop workflow as **Source → Output recipe → Batch summary** with responsive wide and compact layouts. · - Added a unified line-icon system, new ImgConverter app icon, clearer hierarchy, progressive disc

item.title: Bookmark-Organizer-Pro v6.10.0
item.description: Premium workspace redesign and interaction-quality release. Rebuilds the desktop first-run experience, collection pulse, contextual actions, and assistant rail; hardens live themes, focus behavior, WCAG contrast, and non

item.title: ScriptVault v3.19.1
item.description: Premium workbench parity release: canonical navigation, deeper dashboard destinations, reliable settings autosave, recoverable editor fallback, polished compact surfaces, four-theme rendered evidence, and verified Chrome

item.title: NukeMap v3.8.0
item.description: Premium analysis workspace with a map-first navigation dock, editable model/status bar, ground-zero context, responsive desktop/tablet/mobile layouts, refreshed PWA identity, recoverable analysis actions, stronger access

item.title: Wingetter v6.2.0
item.description: Premium GUI and UX release with a redesigned discovery workspace, responsive catalog, persistent reviewed-selection panel, corrected dark/light theming, keyboard and screen-reader improvements, polished dialogs, determin

item.title: TsunamiSimulator v0.5.0
item.description: - **Okada vertical-displacement kernel corrected** against Okada 1985 Table 2 (4-significant-figure agreement on cases 2 and 3). The previous strike-slip term produced non-physical displacement growing with fault length;

item.title: BetterTTS v0.19.0
item.description:
Premium product-quality release for the web and Windows editions.

Highlights:
- Recoverable Queue and Library deletion with Undo
- Complete mobile workspace rail and editor-level Generate action
- Keyboard tab navi

item.title: Images v0.2.25
item.description: Premium image-first viewer redesign with a compact 52px rail, dominant canvas, focused Details inspector, streamlined gallery and settings hierarchy, and reduced permanent chrome. Includes WPF dispatcher reliability and

item.title: ScriptVault v3.19.0
item.description: Professional workbench redesign with a premium graphite-and-emerald dashboard, live vault metrics, contextual script inspection, unified popup/side-panel/install/DevTools surfaces, and browser-rendered visual regression

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.65
item.description: Premium WPF workbench redesign with a vector product identity, continuous primary and secondary navigation, refined dark/light surface hierarchy, semantic alert and focus states, unified themed dialogs, localized About s

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.3.1
item.description: Adds live assessment save-status feedback and protects Save state and Load state while scans or report exports mutate audit data. All persisted check fields, scan results, profile changes, and theme changes now mark the

item.title: BetterTTS v0.17.0
item.description: Premium production-workspace redesign for the web and Windows desktop app. Adds persistent workspace navigation, real Output/Queue/Library tabs, integrated output transport, compact properties controls, neutral dark/ligh

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.3.0
item.description: Premium C# security posture workstation redesign with a resizable checks and evidence inspector, truthful readiness and unscanned states, stronger accessibility, recoverable scan failures, deterministic GUI capture, and

item.title: RES-Slim v0.15.1
item.description: Old.reddit-focused fork of Reddit Enhancement Suite. Chrome MV3 + Firefox MV2. 494 contract tests. Bundles everything since v0.14.1 (v0.14.2, v0.15.0, v0.15.1). · - New `pageTheme` module (disabled by default) — an opt-i

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.2.9
item.description: Reliability fix release. C# GUI scans now generate and open the HTML report automatically after successful completion, and CF02 egress checks no longer abandon timed-out socket connect tasks that can surface as unobserve

item.title: BetterTTS v0.15.0
item.description: Changed: Reworked the studio shell into a professional workstation layout with a six-tile command summary, side-by-side script/output workbench, tabbed waveform-style output deck, denser queue/library treatment, refreshe

item.title: Astra-Deck v4.46.34
item.description: Polishes the extension settings overlay into an executive command deck: red hairline shell, top command search, compact navigation rail, denser setting rows, right-side status/profile/health inspector, and persistent bot

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.2.8
item.description: C# rewrite v5.2.8 and PowerShell v4.11.2 audit hardening release. · - Hardened generated HTML links, branding contact email handling, and local import file-size limits. · - Improved CF01 SYSVOL scanning bounds, saved-sta

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.62
item.description: Security and reliability audit release. Hardened CSV exports against spreadsheet formula injection; fixed repeated support-bundle export collisions and empty-log diagnostics; clarified app/service version-mismatch errors

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.61
item.description: Added redacted metadata-only traffic profile exports for support bundles, FW Activity, and HostsGuard.Cli traffic-profile, with time/app/action/protocol filters, JSON/CSV output, Wireshark display-filter hints, and an ex

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.60
item.description: Added optional app/domain usage-budget alert rules backed by retained daily usage rollups, with usage_budget alert inbox entries when thresholds are crossed. Added WPF Firewall Activity controls and HostsGuard.Cli usage-

item.title: HostsGuard v0.12.59
item.description: Changed: · - Made dependency hygiene transitive deferrals source-backed: the ratchet now prints each owning package/version, observed resolved-to-latest drift, reason, and revisit trigger while continuing to fail vulnera

item.title: SwiftFloris v1.9.56
item.description: Roadmap hardening: Han DB access serialization, typed-text log redaction, SQLCipher refresh and freshness gate, bounded sync and translation addon bridges with typed failure/timeout/cancel copy, runtime addon capability

item.title: BetterTTS v0.14.0
item.description: Deep audit hardening release. Includes import/library/queue recovery guardrails, UI accessibility and contrast fixes, diagnostics privacy hardening, bounded article imports, safer service-worker cache keys, exact Kokoro

item.title: BetterTTS v0.13.0
item.description: Roadmap drain release: adds experimental Piper-plus engine wiring, offline/runtime diagnostics hardening, document import and playback reliability improvements, queue editing, local smoke coverage, and v0.13.0 version sy

item.title: Network_Security_Auditor v5.2.7
item.description: Network Security Auditor v5.2.7 / PowerShell v4.11.1 · - Aligns C# scoring metadata, framework profile counts, rounding, and waiver expiry semantics. · - Hardens C# CLI/check parsing, scan lifecycle, invariant export dat

item.title: Images v0.2.22
item.description: Images v0.2.22 · Changed: · - Tightened the command palette so common viewer commands rank first, advanced utilities are grouped under Advanced tools, and task synonyms improve search.

item.title: Images v0.2.20
item.description: Removed the main viewer Review workflow, rating/pick/reject side panel, assisted culling, Review workflow mode, Review hotkeys, and command-palette rating import to keep Images leaner.

item.title: Images v0.2.19
item.description: Fixed: removed the floating viewer top command bar with Compare and Export actions so image viewing keeps the top of the viewport clear.

item.title: RES-Slim v0.14.1
item.description: Old.reddit-focused fork of Reddit Enhancement Suite. Chrome MV3 + Firefox MV2. 482→487 contract tests. This is the first tagged release since v0.12.7 and bundles the v0.13.0, v0.14.0, and v0.14.1 work. · - `commentHighli

item.title: SysAdminDoc v4.9.153
item.description: Profile mock-parity refresh: centered line-art header, icon category nav, signal-based Start Here routing, generated Tool Catalog, footer action strip, and refreshed local validation evidence.

item.title: SysAdminDoc v4.9.152
item.description: Modernized the SysAdminDoc profile README into a local, theme-aware public tools command center with refreshed routing, setup, validation, and live rendered-smoke evidence.

item.title: sysadmindoc.github.io v0.21.8
item.description: Restored the homepage contribution heatmap with accessible keyboard and forced-colors support. Corrected the performance audit so load-phase LCP is measured before scripted interaction checks. Includes the built static s

item.title: SwiftFloris v1.9.55
item.description: Smart-compose ghost text no longer blocks while reading personal trigram/bigram storage. The heuristic provider and cache now expose a suspend-aware prediction path used by the NLP worker, reducing per-keystroke stalls w

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.27
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.27 · Added rotating shift-pattern scheduling for DDNNO, 4-on-4-off, Panama, DuPont, and Pitman cycles. · Shift patterns can act as the recurring schedule by themselves or narrow existing weekday se

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.26
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.26 · - Adds Bedtime pre-sleep factor tiles for caffeine, exercise, alcohol, and stress. · - Adds a local correlation chart comparing tagged nights with Sonar/smart-wake restlessness.

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.25
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.25 · - Adds a local Sonar snore/loud-sound event timeline on the Bedtime screen. · - Stores compact start/end/duration/peak/average dB metadata only; no raw audio is retained.

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.24
item.description: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.24 · - Adds a local chronotype quiz on the Bedtime screen. · - Estimates ideal bedtime and wake windows from five on-device answers and the sleep-duration target.

item.title: AlarmClockXtreme v1.15.23
item.description: v1.15.23 · - Adds a local bedtime room-noise baseline when microphone permission is already granted. · - Bedtime reminders now adapt copy for quiet, moderate, or loud room baseline results.

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.6
item.description:
Desktop panel fit.

- Lowered the right analytical panel lane so it sits closer to the season/timeline shelf.
- Tightened the shelf gutter from 12px to 6px while preserving separation.
- Added smoke coverage that fai

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.5
item.description:
Desktop shelf alignment.

- Moved the season summary inline to the left of the timeline as one bottom shelf.
- Reserved bottom shelf space so desktop side panels stop above the season/timeline row.
- Moved update fee

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.4
item.description:
Desktop panel refinement.

- Rebalanced desktop side panels into a wider bounded inspector lane.
- Reworked storm, state, and statistics panels into stable two-column desktop grids.
- Hid the season summary while ana

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.3
item.description:
Premium layout and settings polish.

- Prioritizes the map during mobile track playback with compact header chrome, a smaller restore handle, and a tighter animation dock.
- Refines Settings with helper copy, localize

item.title: HurricaneMap v1.4.2
item.description: Playback map-first layout. Starting track playback now collapses the storm details panel to a restore tab, moves animation controls into a compact fixed map dock, hides competing bottom overlays during playback, and adds

item.title: SwiftShot v2.8.0
item.description: Audit-backlog drain: all 14 verified-but-deferred findings from the v2.7.0 deep audit are now fixed end-to-end, with regression tests (54 -> 75). · - Rotate View no longer breaks mouse-to-image mapping; a shared view tra

item.title: SwiftShot v2.7.0
item.description: Deep audit release: ~50 verified fixes across correctness, data safety, UX, theming, accessibility and performance. Test suite grew from 34 to 54 tests. · **Capture** · - Freehand region capture masks to the drawn shape

item.title: ScriptVault v3.17.0
item.description: Trust enforcement, sync data-safety, and backup slimming. · - **Subresource Integrity "Require" mode is now enforced** — refuses to run any @require/@resource without a verifiable SRI hash; the install review flags every

item.title: ScriptVault v3.16.0
item.description: Deep engineering + product-quality audit pass. · - **GM networking bound to the authenticated caller.** GM_xmlhttpRequest / GM_webSocket / GM_download, GM_getResourceText/URL, GM_loadScript, and menu register/unregister

item.title: ScriptVault v3.15.1
item.description: - **Editor screen was unusable in v3.15.0.** The full-screen editor overlay stacked below the sticky dashboard header, which painted over the Save/Close row and panel tabs — nothing in the top band was visible or clickab
